displayNameZh: AI Prompt 生成 Skill 动画
summary: Yt Audio Prompt Skill component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的AI Prompt 生成 Skill 动画组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-audio-prompt-skill/src/YtAudioPromptSkill.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtAudioPromptSkill` and `ytAudioPromptSkillDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Audio Prompt Skill Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-audio-prompt-skill to my project. Preserve the exported YtAudioPromptSkillProps API and register the YtAudioPromptSkill composition with the default props.
